</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto">In force mode ignora le finestre, prova a matchare TUTTI gli eventi (<code>[STREAMED][INJECT][FORCE]</code>).</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Deduplicate & Cache</h3><a id="user-content-deduplicate--cache" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Deduplicate & Cache" href="#deduplicate--cache"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Evita duplicati per URL o titolo completo <code>[Strd] ...</code>.</li>
<li>Riconosce e converte eventuali vecchi titoli <code>[Streamed]</code> → <code>[Strd]</code> senza duplicare.</li>
<li>Cache disco <code>/tmp/streamed_playlist_cache.json</code>.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Robustezza Fetch</h3><a id="user-content-robustezza-fetch" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Robustezza Fetch" href="#robustezza-fetch"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Browser-like headers, DNS log, retry con backoff, fallback <code>requests</code>, cache TTL.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Rigenerazione Eventi</h3><a id="user-content-rigenerazione-eventi" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Rigenerazione Eventi" href="#rigenerazione-eventi"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Ogni <code>/live/update</code> resetta gli stream <code>[Strd]</code>; serve un nuovo ciclo polling / reload per reiniettarli.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Propagazione Header Playback (Opzionale)</h3><a id="user-content-propagazione-header-playback-opzionale" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Propagazione Header Playback (Opzionale)" href="#propagazione-header-playback-opzionale"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Alcuni flussi necessitano header HTTP specifici (Origin, Referer, User-Agent) per funzionare correttamente quando aperti direttamente da un player.</p>
<p dir="auto">Quando <code>STREAMED_PROPAGATE_HEADERS=1</code> e la playlist M3U contiene direttive <code>#EXTVLCOPT:http-<header>=<valore></code>, questi header vengono incorporati nell'URL finale come parametri di query:</p>
<p dir="auto">Esempio URL trasformato:</p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto"><pre class="notranslate"><code>https://cdn.example.xyz/abcd/index.m3u8?h_Origin=https%3A%2F%2Fembedsports.top&h_Referer=https%3A%2F%2Fembedsports.top%2F&h_User-Agent=Mozilla%2F5.0...
</code></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="https://cdn.example.xyz/abcd/index.m3u8?h_Origin=https%3A%2F%2Fembedsports.top&h_Referer=https%3A%2F%2Fembedsports.top%2F&h_User-Agent=Mozilla%2F5.0..." tabindex="0" role="button">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon">
    <path d="M0 6.75C0 5.784.784 5 1.75 5h1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.5h-1.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v1.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 9.25 16h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 0 14.25Z"></path><path d="M5 1.75C5 .784 5.784 0 6.75 0h7.5C15.216 0 16 .784 16 1.75v7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 14.25 11h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 5 9.25Zm1.75-.25a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-7.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25-.25Z"></path>
</svg>
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-check js-clipboard-check-icon color-fg-success d-none">
    <path d="M13.78 4.22a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.06l-7.25 7.25a.75.75 0 0 1-1.06 0L2.22 9.28a.751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018L6 10.94l6.72-6.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0Z"></path>
</svg>
    </clipboard-copy>
  </div></div>
<p dir="auto">Dettagli:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Modalità attuale: <code>STREAMED_HEADER_MODE=url_params</code> (unica implementata).</li>
<li>Prefisso configurabile: <code>STREAMED_HEADER_PARAM_PREFIX</code> (default <code>h_</code>).</li>
<li>Viene anche aggiunto il campo <code>xHeaders</code> nello stream (metadato) con la mappa originale per client che vogliono ricostruire gli header.</li>
<li>Nessuna logica lato server di re-fetch con header al momento: il player deve gestire (o ignorare) i parametri.</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">Motivazione: evitare un proxy interno dedicato finché non strettamente necessario, mantenendo link diretti ma auto-descrittivi.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Variabili Coinvolte</h4><a id="user-content-variabili-coinvolte" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Variabili Coinvolte" href="#variabili-coinvolte"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Variabile</th>
<th>Effetto</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>STREAMED_PROPAGATE_HEADERS=1</code></td>
<td>Abilita trasformazione URL con parametri header</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>STREAMED_HEADER_MODE=url_params</code></td>
<td>Usa parametri di query (futuro: <code>proxy</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>STREAMED_HEADER_PARAM_PREFIX=h_</code></td>
<td>Cambia prefisso (<code>h_Origin</code>, <code>h_Referer</code>, ecc.)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Caveat & Best Practice</h4><a id="user-content-caveat--best-practice" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Caveat & Best Practice" href="#caveat--best-practice"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Alcuni player ignorano parametri informativi: se un flusso non parte, prova un player esterno (VLC) o l'uso del proxy MFP.</li>
<li>Non inserire header sensibili (token auth) — diventano visibili nel link.</li>
<li>Se l'URL originale aveva query params, vengono preservati e merge-ati.</li>
<li>In caso di conflitto di chiavi, l'ultima scrittura (header propagato) prevale.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Strategia Fallback (Futura)</h4><a id="user-content-strategia-fallback-futura" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Strategia Fallback (Futura)" href="#strategia-fallback-futura"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Se emergono molti player che non rispettano i parametri, verrà introdotta una modalità <code>STREAMED_HEADER_MODE=proxy</code> che:</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Riconosce parametri <code>h_*</code>.</li>
<li>Effettua fetch server-side con header reali.</li>
<li>Risponde con passthrough (senza esporre header al client).</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">Attualmente questa modalità NON è implementata per ridurre complessità e latenza.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Troubleshooting Rapido</h4><a id="user-content-troubleshooting-rapido-1" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Troubleshooting Rapido" href="#troubleshooting-rapido-1"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Sintomo</th>
<th>Possibile Causa</th>
<th>Azione</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Stream <code>[Strd]</code> non parte, altri sì</td>
<td>Player ignora header</td>
<td>Testa con VLC / abilita proxy MFP</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Header non appaiono in URL</td>
<td><code>STREAMED_PROPAGATE_HEADERS</code> non impostato</td>
<td>Esporta variabile a <code>1</code> e reinietta (reload/force)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Parametri duplicati</td>
<td>Prefisso cambiato più volte</td>
<td>Uniforma <code>STREAMED_HEADER_PARAM_PREFIX</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Troppi parametri lunghi</td>
<td>User-Agent molto esteso</td>
<td>Usa UA più corto tramite <code>STREAMED_UA</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">⏱️ Scheduler & Watcher Recap (PD + Streamed)</h2><a id="user-content-️-scheduler--watcher-recap-pd--streamed" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: ⏱️ Scheduler & Watcher Recap (PD + Streamed)" href="#️-scheduler--watcher-recap-pd--streamed"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<p dir="auto">Note:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Gli stream <code>[P🐽D]</code> sono persistiti nel file rigenerato a ogni <code>/live/update</code> (non serve un endpoint dedicato PD).</li>
<li>Gli stream <code>[Streamed]</code> non sono persistiti tra rigenerazioni: ogni nuova rigenerazione richiede un nuovo ciclo Streamed.</li>
<li>Force mode Streamed è pensato solo per test / validazione; in produzione lasciare alla logica temporale per evitare clutter.</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🆕 Integrazioni Recenti (Sintesi Rapida)</h2><a id="user-content--integrazioni-recenti-sintesi-rapida" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🆕 Integrazioni Recenti (Sintesi Rapida)" href="#-integrazioni-recenti-sintesi-rapida"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Feature</th>
<th>Dettagli</th>
<th>Ordering Impatto</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>RBTV / RB77</td>
<td>Nuova sorgente playlist italiana (poll ~120s). Filtra solo titoli con token IT (italiano/italia/italy/ital/ita/ it ). Persistenza per evento. Prefisso <code>[RB77🇮🇹]</code> + simbolo dinamico (🚫 / 🔴).</td>
<td>Inserito dopo blocco <code>[P🐽D]</code> + cluster 🇮🇹 e prima di <code>[Strd]</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>PD Relax Competizioni</td>
<td>Per Serie A/B/C, coppe, F1, MotoGP, Tennis, Volley ecc: ignorato brand allowlist; richiesti team match (o single-entity) + token italiano nel broadcaster. Altre competizioni: brand + token IT obbligatori. (Nessun simbolo dinamico per PD).</td>
<td>Mantiene blocco iniziale in cima agli stream evento.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Streamed <code>[Strd]</code></td>
<td>Aggiunti simboli dinamici (🚫 >10m prima, 🔴 da -10m in poi). Persistenza fuori discovery conservata + refresh simboli.</td>
<td>Continua a posizionarsi dopo RB77.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Simboli Dinamici</td>
<td>Applicati solo a RB77 e Strd (🚫 / 🔴).</td>
<td>Non altera logica ordering, solo titoli (PD escluso).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SPSO <code>[SPSO]</code></td>
<td>Playlist SportSOnline: varianti compatte <code>[SPSO] ⚽ [VARIANTE]</code>, nessun nome evento. Persistenza su file dedicato.</td>
<td>Posizionato tra RB77 e <code>[Strd]</code>.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Stato Simboli</h3><a id="user-content-stato-simboli" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Stato Simboli" href="#stato-simboli"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<ol dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Crea un Nuovo Space 🆕</strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Vai su Render e accedi.</li>
<li>Clicca sul + in alto a destra e poi su <code>Web Service</code>.</li>
<li><strong>Public Git Repository:</strong> Incolla il repo <code>(https://github.com/qwertyuiop8899/StreamViX)</code>).</li>
<li><strong>Connect</strong></li>
<li><strong>Scegli il nome</strong></li>
<li><strong>Branch</strong> <code>render</code></li>
<li><strong>Instance Type</strong> <code>Free</code></li>
<li><strong>Deploy Web Service</strong></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Build e Deploy 🚀</strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Render avvierà automaticamente la build del tuo addon. Puoi monitorare il processo nella scheda <code>Logs</code>.</li>
<li>Una volta che vedi lo stato "Running", il tuo addon è pronto!</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Installa in Stremio 🎬</strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Nella pagina principale del tuo Space, in alto a sinistra vedrai un link viola, clicca e configura streamvix per poi installarlo su stremio con gli appositi pulsanti.</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🐳 Docker Compose (Avanzato / Self-Hosting)</h3><a id="user-content--docker-compose-avanzato--self-hosting" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🐳 Docker Compose (Avanzato / Self-Hosting)" href="#-docker-compose-avanzato--self-hosting"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Ideale se hai un server o una VPS e vuoi gestire l'addon tramite Docker.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Crea il file <code>docker-compose.yml</code></h4><a id="user-content-crea-il-file-docker-composeyml" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Crea il file docker-compose.yml" href="#crea-il-file-docker-composeyml"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Salva il seguente contenuto in un file chiamato <code>docker-compose.yml</code>, oppure aggiungi questo compose al tuo file esistente:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-ent">services</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">streamvix</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">image</span>: <span class="pl-s">qwertyuiop8899/streamvix:latest</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">container_name</span>: <span class="pl-s">streamvix</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">ports</span>:
      - <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>7860:7860<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    <span class="pl-ent">environment</span>:
      <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Configurazione Base (OBBLIGATORIA)</span>
      - <span class="pl-s">BOTHLINK=true</span>
      - <span class="pl-s">MFP_URL=https://mfp.tuodominio.com  </span><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> MediaFlow Proxy URL</span>
      - <span class="pl-s">MFP_PASSWORD=tuapassword            </span><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> MediaFlow Proxy password</span>
      - <span class="pl-s">TMDB_API_KEY=tua_chiave_tmdb        </span><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api</span>
      
      <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Anime (opzionale)</span>
      - <span class="pl-s">ANIMEUNITY_ENABLED=true</span>
      - <span class="pl-s">ANIMESATURN_ENABLED=true</span>
      
      <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Live TV & Eventi Sportivi</span>
      - <span class="pl-s">Enable_Live_TV=true</span>
      
      <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Eventi Sportivi Avanzati (opzionale - configurazione automatica se omesso)</span>
      <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> - SPON_PROG_URL=https://sportzonline.st/prog.txt</span>
      <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> - RBTV_DISCOVERY_BEFORE_MIN=15</span>
      <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> - STREAMED_ENABLE=1</span>
      
      <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Installazione Locale/VPS (opzionale - per FHD VixSrc synthetic)</span>
      <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> - ADDON_BASE_URL=https://streamvix.tuodominio.com</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">restart</span>: <span class="pl-s">always</span>
    
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Watchtower per aggiornamenti automatici immagine (opzionale)</span>
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> watchtower:</span>
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span>   image: containrrr/watchtower</span>
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span>   container_name: watchtower</span>
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span>   volumes:</span>
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span>     - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock</span>
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span>   restart: always</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="services:
  streamvix:
    image: qwertyuiop8899/streamvix:latest
    container_name: streamvix
    ports:
      - "7860:7860"
    environment:
      # Configurazione Base (OBBLIGATORIA)
      - BOTHLINK=true
      - MFP_URL=https://mfp.tuodominio.com  # MediaFlow Proxy URL
      - MFP_PASSWORD=tuapassword            # MediaFlow Proxy password
      - TMDB_API_KEY=tua_chiave_tmdb        # https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api
      
      # Anime (opzionale)
      - ANIMEUNITY_ENABLED=true
      - ANIMESATURN_ENABLED=true
      
      # Live TV & Eventi Sportivi
      - Enable_Live_TV=true
      
      # Eventi Sportivi Avanzati (opzionale - configurazione automatica se omesso)
      # - SPON_PROG_URL=https://sportzonline.st/prog.txt
      # - RBTV_DISCOVERY_BEFORE_MIN=15
      # - STREAMED_ENABLE=1
      
      # Installazione Locale/VPS (opzionale - per FHD VixSrc synthetic)
      # - ADDON_BASE_URL=https://streamvix.tuodominio.com
    restart: always
    
  # Watchtower per aggiornamenti automatici immagine (opzionale)
  # watchtower:
  #   image: containrrr/watchtower
  #   container_name: watchtower
  #   volumes:
  #     - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
  #   restart: always" tabindex="0" role="button">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon">

</svg>
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-check js-clipboard-check-icon color-fg-success d-none">
    <path d="M13.78 4.22a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.06l-7.25 7.25a.75.75 0 0 1-1.06 0L2.22 9.28a.751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018L6 10.94l6.72-6.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0Z"></path>
</svg>
    </clipboard-copy>
  </div></div>
<p dir="auto">TMDB Api KEY, MFP link e MFP password e i due flag necessari verranno gestiti dalla pagina di installazione.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Esegui Docker Compose</h4><a id="user-content-esegui-docker-compose" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Esegui Docker Compose" href="#esegui-docker-compose"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Apri un terminale nella directory dove hai salvato il <code>docker-compose.yml</code> ed esegui il seguente comando per costruire l'immagine e avviare il container in background:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>docker compose up -d</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="docker compose up -d" tabindex="0" role="button">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon">
    <path d="M0 6.75C0 5.784.784 5 1.75 5h1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.5h-1.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v1.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 9.25 16h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 0 14.25Z"></path><path d="M5 1.75C5 .784 5.784 0 6.75 0h7.5C15.216 0 16 .784 16 1.75v7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 14.25 11h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 5 9.25Zm1.75-.25a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-7.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25-.25Z"></path>

<p dir="auto">Con watchtower l'immagine sara' aggiornata automaticamente.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">💻 Metodo 3: Installazione Locale (per Esperti NON TESTATO)</h3><a id="user-content--metodo-3-installazione-locale-per-esperti-non-testato" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 💻 Metodo 3: Installazione Locale (per Esperti NON TESTATO)" href="#-metodo-3-installazione-locale-per-esperti-non-testato"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<span class="pl-c1">cd</span> StreamViX <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Entra nella directory del progetto appena clonata</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<p dir="auto">L'addon sarà disponibile localmente all'indirizzo <code>http://localhost:7860</code>.</p>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🔍 Troubleshooting Rapido</h2><a id="user-content--troubleshooting-rapido" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🔍 Troubleshooting Rapido" href="#-troubleshooting-rapido"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Problema</th>
<th>Possibili Cause</th>
<th>Soluzione</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Nessun stream SPON negli eventi</td>
<td>MFP non configurato</td>
<td>Verifica <code>MFP_URL</code> e <code>MFP_PASSWORD</code> nelle env vars</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Stream SPON non funzionano</td>
<td>MFP non raggiungibile o password errata</td>
<td>Testa MFP direttamente, controlla logs <code>[SPON][FALLBACK]</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Pochi canali SPON</td>
<td>File prog.txt vuoto o non scaricato</td>
<td>Controlla logs <code>[SPON][SCHEDULE]</code>, verifica <code>sportzonline.st</code> raggiungibile</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Eventi spariscono troppo presto</td>
<td><code>DYNAMIC_PURGE_HOUR</code> troppo basso</td>
<td>Aumenta a 8+ o imposta <code>DYNAMIC_DISABLE_RUNTIME_FILTER=1</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Download prog.txt fallisce</td>
<td>Dominio sportzonline.st temporaneamente down</td>
<td>Imposta <code>SPON_PROG_URL</code> custom o <code>SPON_PROG_FALLBACKS</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Estrattore TypeScript non viene chiamato</td>
<td>MFP wrap funziona sempre</td>
<td>Comportamento normale (fallback solo se wrap MFP fallisce)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<hr>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🔍 Comando Grep per Trovare le Righe</h3><a id="user-content--comando-grep-per-trovare-le-righe" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🔍 Comando Grep per Trovare le Righe" href="#-comando-grep-per-trovare-le-righe"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Se le righe cambiano, usa questi comandi per trovarle velocemente:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> STREAMED</span>
grep -n <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>process.env.STREAMED_ENABLE<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> src/addon.ts

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> RBTV  </span>
grep -n <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>process.env.RBTV_ENABLE<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> src/addon.ts

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> SPSO</span>
grep -n <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>process.env.SPSO_ENABLE<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> src/addon.ts

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> PD</span>
grep -n <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>PD_ENABLE<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> Live.py

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> TVTAP</span>
grep -n <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>TVTAP_ENABLE<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> src/addon.ts

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> GD</span>
grep -n <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>GDPLAYER_STREAM_DISABLE<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> src/addon.ts</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="# STREAMED
grep -n "process.env.STREAMED_ENABLE" src/addon.ts

# RBTV  
grep -n "process.env.RBTV_ENABLE" src/addon.ts

# SPSO
grep -n "process.env.SPSO_ENABLE" src/addon.ts

# PD
grep -n "PD_ENABLE" Live.py

# TVTAP
grep -n "TVTAP_ENABLE" src/addon.ts

# GD
grep -n "GDPLAYER_STREAM_DISABLE" src/addon.ts" tabindex="0" role="button">
